description: Create an OpenSearch dashboard named 'SSH Threat Monitoring' using the 'wazuh-alerts-*' index pattern. The dashboard must include a vertical bar chart named 'SSH Failures Over Time' showing the count of SSH authentication failures over time and a pie chart named 'Top SSH Attacking IPs' showing the top source IP addresses (field: 'data.srcip'). Filter the data for alerts where rule.groups includes 'authentication_failed' or 'sshd'.
